## AI Video Creator v1.0.10

### Hotfix — desktop launch crash (v1.0.8 regression)
- **`scripts/lib/open-sora-paths.cjs` was missing from the Electron package** — main process threw `Cannot find module` on startup after v1.0.8 added cross-platform Open-Sora defaults
- Added packaging regression test so required `main.js` scripts stay in `build.files`
- CI: increased environment-scan test timeout for GitHub Actions

Installed **v1.0.8** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
